notes: Security tooling for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) ecosystem. First dedicated MCP security scanner. Combines rule-based checks with LLM-powered semantic analysis.

data.description: Comprehensive security analysis tool for MCP servers and AI agents. Evaluates safety and trustworthiness by analyzing agents, tools, resources, prompts, and capabilities.
